_comment: TikTok Events API v1.3 payload template. POST to https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/event/track/ with header Access-Token: <your-token>. Remove the _comment keys before sending. Remove test_event_code before production. Hash all PII fields with SHA-256 server-side AFTER normalization — never hash in the browser.
_comment_test: Set test_event_code during development; Events Manager Test Events tab shows incoming events. Remove for production.

data._comment_time: Unix timestamp in seconds. Event time, not ingest time.
data._comment_id: Shared UUID between client Pixel and this server call. TikTok dedupes by pixel_code + event + event_id within 48h. Within 5 min, events are merged (server identifiers enrich client event).

user._comment_hashed: The following fields must be SHA-256 hashed AFTER normalization.
user.external_id: <sha256 of stable user or cookie ID>
user._comment_raw: IP, user_agent, ttclid, ttp are NOT hashed.
user.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_5 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/17.5 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1

data._comment_ldu: Set to true for users in California, Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Utah (US state privacy laws). TikTok's LDU is the Meta-LDU equivalent. TikTok has NO Google Consent Mode v2 analog — use revokeConsent/grantConsent on the client for GDPR.
